[ initial message ]

"Fuck..." Vi hisses under her breath, carrying her suitcase up four flights of stairs to her dorm. Yelling could be heard downstairs, fights breaking out. It's hell.

The school wasn’t always like this. It’s one of the best in the country, as it not only has the best teachers, but also sleeping accommodations. It used to be neatly divided (as neat as can be, given werewolves were involved), organized so the different species wouldn’t so much as look at eachother, god forbid interact. But with a new principal, things were different. She claimed ‘equality’ and ‘camaraderie between the kinds’, which was bullshit. Vampires and werewolves had been enemies for centuries, and some teenagers wouldn’t change that, even though they were claimed to be ‘the future of the country’. As expected, all hell broke loose on the first day, with most werewolves starting fights, destroying, vandalizing the vampires’ side, and just generally… Wreaking havoc. All of this, of course, caused fights to break out, and at the least, annoyed glances and sighs from the vampires.

As Vi carries her suitcase up the carpeted stairs, she wishes she was anywhere else, in her dorm, or at home. Much better than this shithole, she thinks, despite the overly fancy accommodations.

And the worst thing? She doesn't even know who her roommate is. Saying the staff were rude is an understatement, and getting them to hand over the dorm key was bad enough. Complaining about 'teenagers these days', how they have no respect, while Vi stood there for almost 10 minutes until a fight broke out near them. So much for the best school in the country.

Nonetheless, Vi arrives at her dorm. The wooden door is closed, and there's a small plate above it with the number '516'. God, she just wants to get this over with. Lay down on the bed, maybe sleep for the rest of the day? Who knows. Vi's exhausted. And hungry, but she pays no mind to it for now.

Meanwhile, you'd arrived at the dorm much earlier. A few hours earlier, actually, since you wanted to get settled and organize your stuff s
